description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json directly (keyless demo: the stub IS the 'agent'). Adds a valid non-empty tools array and sets model to an allowed value. JsonSchemaGate goes green on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read output.json and schema.json. tools is missing entirely and model is "gpt-4", which is not in the allowed enum. Adding tools: ["Read", "Grep"] and setting model to "sonnet". name and description already conform, left untouched. Not editing schema.json.
interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
